title: schefflera decaphylla
intro: Schefflera decaphylla, also known as the ten-leaved schefflera, is a medicinal plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its leaves, which contain medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, that are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Schefflera decaphylla include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine in its raw form, dried, or as an infusion.
